completed.name: Sign in via OAuth on the web application

remaining_sequence.name: Create and manage client projects with currency and billable rate
remaining_sequence.rationale: C3 (Project Management) depends on C1 and C2 — both skeleton-built (S1, completed, satisfied). S4 is the sole frontier item at this position; value high; no risk retired but unblocks both S2 and S3.

remaining_sequence.name: Export a monthly PDF invoice with line items and monetary totals
remaining_sequence.retires_risk: Server-side PDF generation (A1): first exercise of the backend PDF library (e.g. Puppeteer or WeasyPrint); proves file generation and browser-stream delivery work before the feature is considered done.

moved.basis: Real DAG: C5 (Invoice Export) depends on C1 and C3 only — no dependency on C4 (Time Logging). Coarse dep on S2 removed. S3 is now dependency-legal as soon as S4 is placed; at the two-slice frontier {S2, S3} both have value=high, but S3 retires risk A1 (Server-side PDF generation) while S2 retires none — risk-retirement tiebreak (discriminator 5b) moves S3 ahead.

remaining_sequence.rationale: C5 depends on C1 (skeleton-built) and C3 (S4, placed). Coarse dep on S2 removed by real DAG — C5 does not depend on C4. Value high; retires PDF generation risk A1; advances over S2 on the risk-retirement tiebreak.

remaining_sequence.name: Log and persist billable time entries against a project

moved.basis: S3's coarse dep on S2 was removed by the real DAG; S3 became dependency-legal at position 3 simultaneously with S2. At the frontier, S3 retires risk A1 and S2 retires none — discriminator 5b places S3 first, pushing S2 to position 4.

remaining_sequence.rationale: C4 depends on C1 (skeleton-built) and C3 (S4, placed). Real deps unchanged from coarse. Value high; no risk retired; placed after S3 because S3 won the risk-retirement tiebreak at the shared frontier.

changes.thrash_avoided: S4 unchanged at position 2 — its real depends_on matches the coarse graph exactly (S1 confirmed, no removed or added deps).
